# Dhīmahi Technolabs – LLMs.txt

> Dhīmahi Technolabs is a Gujarat-based IT consultancy with 25+ years of experience, helping small and medium enterprises (SMEs) in Ahmedabad and Gandhinagar grow with practical AI automation, digital marketing, and smart IT strategy — without enterprise complexity or cost.

## Company

- **Name**: Dhīmahi Technolabs
- **Tagline**: From Digital Chaos to Business Clarity
- **Location**: Gandhinagar & Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
- **Founded**: 1999
- **Website**: https://www.dhimahitechnolabs.com
- **Email**: hello@dhimahitechnolabs.com
- **Focus**: SME digital transformation in Gujarat

## Services

- [AI & Automation Consulting](https://www.dhimahitechnolabs.com/services/ai-automation): AI adoption strategy, business process automation, chatbots & virtual assistants, data-driven insights.
- [Digital Marketing](https://www.dhimahitechnolabs.com/services/digital-marketing): SEO, social media marketing, PPC campaigns, content marketing.
- [Application Portfolio Rationalisation](https://www.dhimahitechnolabs.com/services/application-portfolio-rationalisation): Technology landscape assessment, cost optimisation, AI integration opportunity mapping.

## Why Dhīmahi Technolabs

- 25+ years of IT, digital marketing, and AI expertise
- Local focus: deep understanding of Ahmedabad & Gandhinagar SME market
- Practical, affordable solutions with measurable ROI
- Future-ready: AI, automation, and digital growth strategies
- 200+ businesses transformed across Gujarat

## Client Results (Anonymised)

- Furniture retail store (Gandhinagar): Launched e-commerce website with integrated payments and inventory tracking — online orders started within weeks of launch.
- Service company (Gandhinagar): Website redesign and SEO led to 40% more leads within 3 months.
- Physiotherapy & fitness centre (Gandhinagar): Custom app replaced hours of spreadsheet work with minutes of digital management.
- Manufacturing SME (Ahmedabad): AI-powered sales follow-up automation improved response time by 70%.
- Coaching institute (Ahmedabad): Digital portal for registrations and payments grew enrolments by 35%.
- Multispeciality clinic (Ahmedabad): Automated booking and notification system reduced no-shows by 60%.
